---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research tools, web experiments, and things I've built."
page-layout: full
code-tools: false
---

::: cli-prompt
<span class="text-terminal-primary">cole@press:~$</span> <code class="text-glow">ls -la ~/projects/</code>
:::

::: {.terminal-dense}
```
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Jan 2026  ai-tools/
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Mar 2026  research-automation/
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Apr 2026  web-experiments/
drwxr-xr-x  cole  staff  Apr 2026  cole-press/
```
:::

:::::: nav-grid-compact

::: {.project-item .blog}
**AI Tools**

Exploring open-source language models and building practical applications for research and clinical workflows.

[**View on GitHub →**](https://github.com/colerehbein){.project-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::

::: {.project-item .cv}
**Research Automation**

Building reproducible analysis pipelines in R and Python. Psychometric analysis, longitudinal data processing, and automated reporting.

[**View on GitHub →**](https://github.com/colerehbein){.project-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::

::: {.project-item .portfolio}
**Web Experiments**

Small sites and apps — including this one. Built with Quarto, SCSS, and JavaScript. Terminal aesthetic, monospace typography, and zero frameworks.

[**View on GitHub →**](https://github.com/colerehbein){.project-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::

::: {.project-item .blog}
**cole.press**

This website. A Quarto-powered personal site with a terminal/neofetch aesthetic, self-hosted fonts, and a dark mode that doesn't hurt your eyes.

[**Source Code →**](https://github.com/colerehbein/cole_press){.project-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::

::::::
